title: Swapping two inputs leaves the DC mode unchanged

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: The DC mode of a two-point signal is invariant under swapping the two entries.
assumptions: u0 and u1 are real numbers
the DC mode is the sum of the two entries
informal.expected_conclusion: The DC mode is unchanged by swapping entries.

declarations.name: dft2DC
declarations.statement: def dft2DC (u0 u1 : Real) : Real := u0 + u1

declarations.name: dft2DC_swap
declarations.statement: theorem dft2DC_swap (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2DC u1 u0 = dft2DC u0 u1

tasks.input: Translate swap invariance of the two-point DC mode into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem dft2DC_swap (u0 u1 : Real) : dft2DC u1 u0 = dft2DC u0 u1

tasks.input: Complete the Lean proof by unfolding dft2DC and using commutativity of addition.
